#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>

int parse_csv_records(int record_count, int* field_sizes, char** csv_data, char** parsed_buffer) {
    // Validate input parameters
    if (record_count <= 0 || csv_data == NULL || field_sizes == NULL || parsed_buffer == NULL) {
        return -1;
    }

    // Determine the number of fields from the first record
    const char* first_record = csv_data[0];
    if (first_record == NULL) {
        return -1;
    }
    int num_fields = 0;
    const char* p = first_record;
    while (*p) {
        if (*p == ',') {
            num_fields++;
        }
        p++;
    }
    num_fields++; // Number of fields is commas + 1

    // Calculate buffer size per record and validate field_sizes
    size_t record_size = 0;
    for (int j = 0; j < num_fields; j++) {
        if (field_sizes[j] < 1) {
            return -1; // Field size must be at least 1
        }
        record_size += field_sizes[j];
    }

    // Calculate total buffer size
    size_t total_size = record_count * record_size;
    char* buffer = (char*)malloc(total_size);
    if (buffer == NULL) {
        return -1; // Memory allocation failed
    }

    // Parse each record into fixed-width fields
    char* current_record = buffer;
    for (int i = 0; i < record_count; i++) {
        const char* record = csv_data[i];
        if (record == NULL) {
            free(buffer);
            return -1; // Null record encountered
        }
        
        const char* p_record = record;
        int field_index = 0;
        char* current_field = current_record;

        // Split record into fields
        while (*p_record && field_index < num_fields) {
            const char* start = p_record;
            while (*p_record && *p_record != ',') {
                p_record++;
            }
            size_t field_len = p_record - start;
            size_t copy_len = (field_len < (size_t)(field_sizes[field_index]-1)) 
                            ? field_len 
                            : (field_sizes[field_index]-1);
            
            // Copy field data with null termination
            memcpy(current_field, start, copy_len);
            current_field[copy_len] = '\0';
            current_field += field_sizes[field_index];
            field_index++;

            if (*p_record == ',') {
                p_record++; // Skip comma
            }
        }

        // Verify all fields were parsed
        if (field_index != num_fields) {
            free(buffer);
            return -1; // Insufficient fields in record
        }

        current_record += record_size; // Move to next record
    }

    *parsed_buffer = buffer;
    return 0; // Success
}

    if (record_count <= 0 || field_sizes == NULL || csv_data == NULL || parsed_buffer == NULL) {

            return -1;

            return -1;
        }
        size_t len_i = strlen(csv_data[i]);
        // Check for integer overflow during addition

            return -1;
        }
        total_size += len_i;
    }

    // Add space for commas between records (record_count - 1 commas)
    if (record_count > 1) {
        size_t comma_space = record_count - 1;
        if (comma_space > SIZE_MAX - total_size) {

        }
        total_size += comma_space;

    if (total_size > SIZE_MAX - 1) {

            write_ptr++;
        }
    }

}
